description: Journal about cooking experiments, asking about hobbies

memory_chunks.content: Attempted to make homemade pasta from scratch today. It was messier than expected but the result was genuinely better than store-bought. Totally worth the effort.
Tried a Thai green curry recipe. I couldn't find galangal at any store nearby so I substituted ginger. It tasted good but wasn't quite right — need to find an Asian grocery.
Hosted a dinner party for 6 people. Made three courses. Everyone loved the lamb chops. A friend asked for the recipe — felt great as a self-taught cook.
Bought a new cookbook focused on fermentation. Sourdough starter is sitting on my counter. Day 3 of feeding it — no bubbles yet but I'm being patient.

query: What hobbies have I been spending time on lately?
